--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Title: google pixel 9a (obsidian, 256 gb) (8 gb ram) Key Features: brand google operating system android 15 ram memory installed size 8 gb cpu model google tensor g4 cpu speed 2.6, 3.1 ghz About: about this item the best phone camera; take photos and videos so amazing, you won’t believe you actually took them. capture small details, create perfect group shots, and even get vivid ones at night. the dependable all-day battery the adaptive battery on pixel 9a can last over 30 hours. need even more? turn on extreme battery saver to make it last up to 100. that’s big energy. one ask, done across your apps save time by asking gemini to find information and get things done for you across your google apps – like maps, calendar, gmail, and youtube music. it’s multitasking made easy. it’s built to last pixel 9a is designed to handle spills, dust, drops, and dings. from ip68 water and dust protection to a scratch-resistant display and long-lasting materials, it’s the most durable pixel a-series phone yet. talk things out live instead of typing, use gemini live and have a natural, free-flowing conversation. gemini follows along, even if you change the topic or switch the question mid-sentence. take the picture. and be in it, too add me makes sure no one is left out of a photo. take one with the group, then swap in the photographer, and pixel magically merges both photos. tiny is epic use macro focus to reveal vivid color and striking contrast in photos and videos of the smallest details – like raindrops, flowers, or sprinkles. show more Tech Details: google pixel 9a mobile phone information technical details os android 15 ram 8 gb product dimensions 15.2 x 7.2 x 0.88 cm; 188 g batteries 1 12v batteries required. model snapdragon cpu speed 2.2 ghz About: about this item 5500 mah battery & reverse charging: ditch the power bank and press play all day with nord ce4 lite’s gigantic 5,500 mah battery. you’ll even have enough juice to charge up your buddy’s phone with reverse wired charging 80w supervooc fast charging: add excitement to your day with 80w supervooc fast charging, which fully replenishes the hefty battery in just 20 minutes, ensuring a day's worth of power in no time. superior snaps by sony: harness the power of the 50mp sony lyt-600 main camera, bringing the capability to capture stunning sony-quality photos and videos directly into your palm. boosted battery health: battery health engine, with its smart ai and hardware combo, learns how you charge. it extends your battery life to 4 years, even with daily charges up to 80% or more. easily track and adjust settings to get the most out of your phone. super bright amoled display: dive into the world of bold colors and crisp visuals with 6.67inch 120hz amoled display. no more squinting outdoors or running for shade with our super-bright display that comes with 2,100 nits peak brightness. dual stereo speakers: experience an astonishing 300% increase in volume with the oneplus nord ce4 lite’s dual stereo speakers. you won’t need earplugs, but you might need to apologize to your neighbors for the party vibes! ai smart cutout: use ai smart cutout to swiftly edit photos, choose and personalize cutout selections, and share them with a single tap. oxygenos14: oxygenos 14 isn’t just smarter—it’s designed to --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Title: iqoo z10x 5g (ultramarine, 6gb ram, 128gb storage) | 6500 mah large capacity battery | dimensity 7300 processor | military-grade durability Key Features: brand iqoo operating system funtouch os 15 based on android 15 ram memory installed size 6 gb cpu model others cpu speed 2.5 ghz About: about this item fastest smartphone in the segment*- the powerful mediatek dimensity 7300 processsor built on power-efficient 4nm tsmc process delivers a lag-free everyday experience with lower power consumption. z10x also has an impressive antutu score of 728k+. enjoy faster data transfers with ufs 3.1 storage type and ample storage space with 256 gb edition for the future requirements. 6500mah battery + 44w flashcharge- the massive 6500 mah* battery keeps you always ahead and deliver all-day energy in fulfilling daily entertainment and adventures. the phone has ultra-high energy density that significantly increases battery capacity without causing the phone body to get thicker. 44w flashcharge charges at incredible speed, restoring full power in no time. 120 hz eye care display- it delivers exceptional clarity and ultra-smooth visuals even in bright sunlight. 6.72” (17.06cm) massive screen along with 120hz refresh rate enhances your experience like never before. dual stereo speaker- 400% volume boost. built tough, the z10x is also military-grade certified for durability, combining beauty with resilience. ultra hd image quality- snap stunning photos with 50mp ultra hd camera. capture high resolution true-to-life 4k quality videos to bring out the director inside you. powered by ai, features include ai erase, ai photo enhance, ai documents, ai screen translation at your fingertips. latest software experience- runs on funtouch os 15, based on android 15, offering a seamless experience with 2 years of android updates, 3 years of security patches, *t&c apply. › see significantly increases battery capacity without causing the phone body to get thicker. 44w flashcharge charges at incredible speed, restoring full power in no time. 120 hz eye care display- it delivers exceptional clarity and ultra-smooth visuals even in bright sunlight. 6.72” (17.06cm) massive screen along with 120hz refresh rate enhances your experience like never before. dual stereo camera. capture high resolution true-to-life 4k quality videos to bring out the director inside you. powered by ai, features include ai erase, ai photo enhance, ai documents, ai screen translation at speed 2.2 ghz About: about this item 5500 mah battery & reverse charging: ditch the power bank and press play all day with nord ce4 lite’s gigantic 5,500 mah battery. you’ll even have enough juice to charge up your buddy’s phone with reverse wired charging 80w supervooc fast charging: add excitement to your day with 80w supervooc fast charging, which fully replenishes the hefty battery in just 20 minutes, ensuring a day's worth of power in no time. superior snaps by sony: harness the power of the 50mp sony lyt-600 main camera, bringing the capability to capture stunning sony-quality photos and videos directly into your palm. boosted battery health: battery health engine, with its smart ai and hardware combo, learns how you charge. it extends your battery life to 4 years, even with daily charges up to 80% or more. easily track and adjust settings to get the most out of your phone. super bright amoled display: dive into the world of bold colors and crisp visuals with 6.67inch 120hz amoled display. no more squinting outdoors or running for shade with our super-bright display that comes with 2,100 nits peak brightness. dual stereo speakers: experience an astonishing 300% increase in volume with the oneplus nord ce4 lite’s dual stereo speakers. you won’t need earplugs, but you might need to apologize to your neighbors for the party vibes! ai smart cutout: use ai smart cutout to swiftly edit photos, choose and personalize cutout selections, and share them with a single tap. oxygenos14: oxygenos 14 isn’t just smarter—it’s designed to deliver sustained smoothness and security with guaranteed support for two major android updates and three years of essential security updates. › see more product details Tech Details: oneplus nord ce4 lite 5g mobile phone information best in the segment | 50 mp camera with ois Key Features: brand oneplus operating system oxygenos ram memory installed size 8 gb cpu model snapdragon cpu speed 1.8, 2.4, 2.63 ghz About: about this item highest-power with snapdragon 7 gen 3: experience unrivalled speed and efficiency with the qualcomm snapdragon 7 gen 3 chipset. it powers through demanding tasks, delivers blazing download speeds up to 5gbps, and optimizes battery usage for mobile gaming, productivity, and entertainment without compromise. real-world battery performance: enjoy up to 7.3 hours of video streaming, 19.7 hours of music, 10.9 hours of voice calls, 6.7 hours of social media browsing, or 3.9 hours of gaming—all from a quick 10-minute charge. whether you're working, gaming, or exploring, nord ce4 keeps up with your lifestyle. 100w supervooc charging & 5500mah battery: say goodbye to low-battery anxiety. nord ce4 features the most powerful fast charging in nord history. with 100w supervooc, charge from 1% to 100% in just 30 minutes. smart charging 4.0 learns your usage patterns to prevent overheating and extend battery life, giving you unstoppable power for your day. oxygenos 14.1 (upgrade available to oxygenos 15) – experience a clean, bloat-free interface with oxygenos 14, optimised for speed, fluidity, and seamless multitasking. upgrade to oxygenos 15 for enhanced ai-driven optimisations, intuitive gestures, and smart features. seamless multitasking with ram expansion: switch between apps effortlessly with 8gb of ram and up to 8gb of virtual ram expansion. combined with up to 256gb of storage and support for microsd cards up to 1tb, nord ce4 ensures smooth performance and plenty of space for your files, apps, and memories. durability meets performance: built to withstand the toughest conditions, the nord ce4 features a mega-durable bezel material that passed a 1.5-meter drop test onto marble. it’s tough, sleek, and ready for any adventure. design: oneplus nord ce4 comes in 2 colourways - ------------------------------------------------------------- Title: oneplus nord ce4 lite 5g (super silver, 8gb ram, 128gb storage) | lifetime display warranty | 5500 mah battery, 80w supervooc and reverse charging | 50mp camera with ois | 120hz amoled display Key Features: brand oneplus operating system oxygenos ram memory installed size 8 gb cpu model snapdragon cpu speed 2.2 ghz About: about this item 5500 mah battery & reverse charging: ditch the power bank and press play all day with nord ce4 lite’s gigantic 5,500 mah battery. you’ll even have enough juice to charge up your buddy’s phone with reverse wired charging 80w supervooc fast charging: add excitement to your day with 80w supervooc fast charging, which fully replenishes the hefty battery in just 20 minutes, ensuring a day's worth of power in no time. superior snaps by sony: harness the power of the 50mp sony lyt-600 main camera, bringing the capability to capture stunning sony-quality photos and videos directly into your palm. boosted battery health: battery health engine, with its smart ai and hardware combo, learns how you charge. it extends your battery life to 4 years, even with daily charges up to 80% or more. easily track and adjust settings to get the most out of your phone. super bright amoled display: dive into the world of bold colors and crisp visuals with 6.67inch 120hz amoled display. no more squinting outdoors or running for shade with our super-bright display that comes with 2,100 nits peak brightness. dual stereo speakers: experience an astonishing 300% increase in volume with the oneplus nord ce4 lite’s dual stereo speakers. you won’t need earplugs, but you might need to apologize to your neighbors for the party vibes! ai smart cutout: use ai smart cutout to swiftly edit photos, choose and personalize cutout selections, and share them with a single tap. oxygenos14: oxygenos 14 isn’t just smarter—it’s designed to deliver sustained smoothness and security with guaranteed support for two major android updates and three years of essential security updates. › see more product details Tech Details: oneplus nord ce4 lite 5g mobile phone information technical military-grade durability Key Features: brand iqoo operating system funtouch os 15 based on android 15 ram memory installed size 6 gb cpu model others cpu speed 2.5 ghz About: about this item fastest smartphone in the segment*- the powerful mediatek dimensity 7300 processsor built on power-efficient 4nm tsmc process delivers a lag-free everyday experience with lower power consumption. z10x also has an impressive antutu score of 728k+. enjoy faster data transfers with ufs 3.1 storage type and ample storage space with 256 gb edition for the future requirements. 6500mah battery + 44w flashcharge- the massive 6500 mah* battery keeps you always ahead and deliver all-day energy in fulfilling daily entertainment and adventures. the phone has ultra-high energy density that significantly increases battery capacity without causing the phone body to get thicker. 44w flashcharge charges at incredible speed, restoring full power in no time. 120 hz eye care display- it delivers exceptional clarity and ultra-smooth visuals even in bright sunlight. 6.72” (17.06cm) massive screen along with 120hz refresh rate enhances your experience like never before. dual stereo speaker- 400% volume boost. built tough, the z10x is also military-grade certified for durability, combining beauty with resilience. ultra hd image quality- snap stunning photos with 50mp ultra hd camera. capture high resolution true-to-life 4k quality videos to bring out the director inside you. powered by ai, features include ai erase, ai photo enhance, ai documents, ai screen translation at your fingertips. latest software experience- runs on funtouch os 15, based on android 15, offering a seamless experience with 2 years of android updates, 3 years of security patches, *t&c apply. › see victory can be yours with the new snapdragon 8 gen 3 for galaxy that gives you the power you need for all the gameplay you want. backed by an intelligent battery that keep you going longer. also, you get to manifest graphic effects in real time with ray tracing for hyper-realistic shadows and reflections. built-in s pen and security - best in the segment | 50 mp camera with ois Key Features: brand oneplus operating system oxygenos ram memory installed size 8 gb cpu model snapdragon cpu speed 1.8, 2.4, 2.63 ghz About: about this item highest-power with snapdragon 7 gen 3: experience unrivalled speed and efficiency with the qualcomm snapdragon 7 gen 3 chipset. it powers through demanding tasks, delivers blazing download speeds up to 5gbps, and optimizes battery usage for mobile gaming, productivity, and entertainment without compromise. real-world battery performance: enjoy up to 7.3 hours of video streaming, 19.7 hours of music, 10.9 hours of voice calls, 6.7 hours of social media browsing, or 3.9 hours of gaming—all from a quick 10-minute charge. whether you're working, gaming, or exploring, nord ce4 keeps up with your lifestyle. 100w supervooc charging & 5500mah battery: say goodbye to low-battery anxiety. nord ce4 features the most powerful fast charging in nord history. with 100w supervooc, charge from 1% to 100% in just 30 minutes. smart charging 4.0 learns your usage patterns to prevent overheating and extend battery life, giving you unstoppable power for your day. oxygenos 14.1 (upgrade available to oxygenos 15) – experience a clean, bloat-free interface with oxygenos 14, optimised for speed, fluidity, and seamless multitasking. upgrade to oxygenos 15 for enhanced ai-driven optimisations, intuitive gestures, and smart features. seamless multitasking with ram expansion: switch between apps effortlessly with 8gb of ram and up to 8gb of virtual ram expansion. combined with up to 256gb of storage and support for microsd cards up to 1tb, nord ce4 ensures smooth performance and plenty of space for your files, apps, and memories. durability meets performance: built to withstand the toughest conditions, the nord ce4 features a mega-durable bezel material that passed a 1.5-meter drop test onto marble. it’s tough, sleek, and ready for any adventure. design: oneplus nord ce4 comes in 2 colourways - celadon marble, a first for nord and dark chrome, our signature variant. › see more product details Tech Details: oneplus nord ce4 mobile phone information technical details os oxygenos ram 8 gb product dimensions 16.3 x 7.5 x 0.8 cm; 186 g batteries 2 lithium polymer batteries required. -------------------------------------------------------------, filter 'amoled' not found in product details. ------------------------------------------------------------- Title: samsung galaxy s24 ultra 5g ai smartphone with galaxy ai (titanium black, 12gb, 256gb storage), snapdragon 8 gen 3, 200 mp camera with provisual engine and 5000mah battery Key Features: brand samsung operating system android 14 ram memory installed size 12 gb cpu model snapdragon 8 gen3 cpu speed 3.39 ghz About: about this item galaxy ai - welcome to the era of mobile ai. with galaxy s24 ultra and one ui in your hands, you can unleash completely new levels of creativity, productivity and possibility. titanium frame - meet galaxy s24 ultra, the ultimate form of galaxy ultra built with a new titanium exterior and a 17.25cm flat display. it is an absolute marvel of design. epic camera - with the most megapixels on a galaxy smartphone ever (200mp) and ai processing, galaxy s24 ultra sets the industry standard for image quality every time you hit the shutter. also, the new provisual engine recognizes objects, improves color tone, reduces noise and brings out every detail. powerful processor - victory can be yours with the new snapdragon 8 gen 3 for galaxy that gives you the power you need for all the gameplay you want. backed by an intelligent battery that keep you going longer. also, you get to manifest graphic effects in real time with ray tracing for hyper-realistic shadows and reflections. built-in s pen and security - experience seamless control and creativity, as the s pen transforms your device into a versatile tool for productivity and artistry. while knox protection and samsung wallet keep your data and payments safe. › see more product details Tech Details: samsung galaxy s24 ultra 5g ai smartphone mobile phone information technical details os android 14 product dimensions 0.9 x 7.9 x 16.2 cm; 232 g batteries 1 12v batteries required. best in the segment | 50 mp camera with ois Key Features: brand oneplus operating system oxygenos ram memory installed size 8 gb cpu model snapdragon cpu speed 1.8, 2.4, 2.63 ghz About: about this item highest-power with snapdragon 7 gen 3: experience unrivalled speed and efficiency with the qualcomm snapdragon 7 gen 3 chipset. it powers through demanding tasks, delivers blazing download speeds up to 5gbps, and optimizes battery usage for mobile gaming, productivity, and entertainment without compromise. real-world battery performance: enjoy up to 7.3 hours of video streaming, 19.7 hours of music, 10.9 hours of voice calls, 6.7 hours of social media browsing, or 3.9 hours of gaming—all from a quick 10-minute charge. whether you're working, gaming, or exploring, nord ce4 keeps up with your lifestyle. 100w supervooc charging & 5500mah battery: say goodbye to low-battery anxiety. nord ce4 features the most powerful fast charging in nord history. with 100w supervooc, charge from 1% to 100% in just 30 minutes. smart charging 4.0 learns your usage patterns to prevent overheating and extend battery life, giving you unstoppable power for your day. oxygenos 14.1 (upgrade available to oxygenos 15) – experience a clean, bloat-free interface with oxygenos 14, optimised for speed, fluidity, and seamless multitasking. upgrade to oxygenos 15 for enhanced ai-driven optimisations, intuitive gestures, and smart features. seamless multitasking with ram expansion: switch between apps effortlessly with 8gb of ram and up to 8gb of virtual ram expansion. combined with up to 256gb of storage and support for microsd cards up to 1tb, nord ce4 ensures smooth performance and plenty of space for your files, apps, and memories. durability meets performance: built to withstand the toughest conditions, the nord ce4 features a mega-durable bezel material that passed a 1.5-meter drop test onto marble. it’s tough, sleek, and ready for any adventure. design: oneplus nord ce4 comes in 2 colourways - more immersive experience. the realme c71 mobile phone features a massive 6300mah battery that eliminates power anxiety, designed to last from morning to night on a single charge. whether you're a making it more durable than many budget phones. whether you're caught in a sudden downpour, accidentally spill water near the device, or use it in dusty environments, the splash-resistant design provides an extra layer of protection. realme c71 features a remarkably slim 7.94mm profile and lightweight 201g design for exceptional comfort in hand. complementing its ergonomic form, the distinctive circular flash ring design enhances visual appeal while catering to the aesthetic preferences of young users. the realme 4g c71 runs on the realme ui system, deeply customized based on android 15, delivering a smarter and smoother user experience. the upgraded system features comprehensive improvements in performance optimization, privacy protection, and interactive design - -------------------------------------------------------------, filter '16 - 19.9 mp' not found in product details. ------------------------------------------------------------- Title: motorola e32s (slate gray, 4gb ram 64gb storage) Key Features: brand motorola operating system android 13: comes with android 13 for an intuitive, modern user experience with improved privacy c… see more ram memory installed size 4 gb cpu model mediatek helio cpu speed 1.8, 2.3 ghz About: about this item 1️⃣ powerful processor: equipped with the mediatek helio g37 processor, ensuring smooth and lag-free performance for everyday tasks. 2️⃣ 3 gb ram for multitasking: seamlessly switch between apps and enjoy a fluid user experience with 3 gb of ram. 3️⃣ ample storage space: comes with 32 gb internal storage, expandable up to 1 tb via microsd card—enough for all your photos, videos, and apps. 4️⃣ stunning design: the misty silver finish adds a premium touch, making the phone look sleek and stylish. 5️⃣ large 6.5-inch display: enjoy a 6.5-inch hd+ ips lcd display with a 90hz refresh rate, delivering smooth visuals and vibrant colors. › see more product details Tech Details: motorola e32s mobile phone information technical details os android 13: comes with android 13 for an intuitive, modern user experience with improved privacy controls., customizable ui: personalize your phone with dynamic themes, widgets, and enhanced notifications., near-stock android: offers a clean and bloatware-free interface for smooth and clutter-free usage., optimized performance: lightweight os ensures efficient performance and extended battery life., privacy dashboard: provides detailed control over app permissions and data access for better security. ram 3.0 product dimensions 16.4 x 7.49 x 0.85 cm; 179 g batteries 1 lithium ion batteries required. (included) item model number patx0015in wireless communication technologies cellular connectivity technologies 4g volte support: ensures high-quality voice calls and faster internet on 4g networks., bluetooth 5.0: provides faster pairing, improved range, and lower power consumption for connected devices., gps with a-gps, glonass: accurate location tracking and navigation support., usb type-c port: offers faster charging and data transfer compared to traditional micro-usb ports., wi-fi 802.11 a/b/g/n/ac: dual-band wi-fi (2.4ghz and 5ghz) for stable and fast wireless connections. gps true special features 1. hd+ ips lcd display technology: the motorola e32s utilizes an hd+ ips lcd display which offers wider viewing angles and excellent color accuracy, providing a more vibrant and immersive viewing experience for all types of content., 2. advanced connectivity options: equipped with the latest connectivity features such as bluetooth 5.0 and dual-band wi-fi (supporting 2.4 ghz and 5 ghz networks), the e32s ensures faster and more stable connections whether you're at home or on the go., 3. dedicated microsd slot: unlike many modern smartphones, the motorola e32s features a dedicated microsd slot that allows users to expand storage without sacrificing the dual sim functionality, making it an ideal choice for users who need extra space for their files and media., 4. water repellent design: the device comes with a water-repellent coating that protects against moderate exposure to water, such as accidental spills, splashes, or light rain, adding an extra layer of durability., 5. biometric security features: for enhanced security, the motorola e32s includes a side-mounted fingerprint sensor and face recognition technology. these biometric features offer users a quick and secure way to unlock their phones, access sensitive information, and authenticate transactions with just a touch or a glance. other display features wireless device interface - primary buttons, keypad, microphone, touchscreen resolution the motorola e32s features a display resolution of 720 x 1600 pixels. other camera features the motorola e32s features a 16mp triple rear camera system, including a 16mp main lens for sharp, vibrant photos, a 2mp depth sensor for stunning portraits with natural bokeh, and a 2mp macro lens for capturing fine details up close. enhanced by ai technology, this camera setup allows you to take high-quality images in various scenarios, from landscapes to close-ups, ensuring every shot is impressive and detailed. audio jack usb type c form factor bar colour slate gray battery power rating 5000 milliamp hours phone talk time 40 hours whats in the box power adapter, sim tray ejector, screen protector, usb cable manufacturer motorola india pvt ltd 12th floor, tower-d dlf phase-3, cyber greens, gurgaon-122001 item weight 179 g additional information asin b0b6jjn3y7 customer reviews 3.6 200 ratings 3.6 out of 5 stars best sellers rank #92,186 in electronics (see top 100 in electronics) #942 in smartphones date first available 14 july 2022 manufacturer motorola india pvt ltd 12th floor, tower-d dlf phase-3, cyber greens, gurgaon-122001 packer motorola india pvt ltd 12th floor, tower-d dlf phase-3, cyber greens, gurgaon-122001 importer motorola india pvt ltd 12th floor, tower-d dlf phase-3, cyber greens, gurgaon-122001 item dimensions lxwxh 16.4 x 7.5 x 0.8 centimeters net quantity 1.0 count generic name smart phone || mobile phone || cellular phone || android phone || mobile || smart handset || cell phone feedback would you like to tell us about a lower price? -------------------------------------------------------------, filter '16 - Title: oneplus nord ce4 lite 5g (super silver, 8gb ram, 128gb storage) | lifetime display warranty | 5500 mah battery, 80w supervooc and reverse charging | 50mp camera with ois | 120hz amoled display Key Features: brand oneplus operating system oxygenos ram memory installed size 8 gb cpu model snapdragon cpu speed 2.2 ghz About: about this item 5500 mah battery & reverse charging: ditch the power bank and press play all day with nord ce4 lite’s gigantic 5,500 mah battery. you’ll even have enough juice to charge up your buddy’s phone with reverse wired charging 80w supervooc fast charging: add excitement to your day with 80w supervooc fast charging, which fully replenishes the hefty battery in just 20 minutes, ensuring a day's worth of power in no time. superior snaps by sony: harness the power of the 50mp sony lyt-600 main camera, bringing the capability to capture stunning sony-quality photos and videos directly into your palm. boosted battery health: battery health engine, with its smart ai and hardware combo, learns how you charge. it extends your battery life to 4 years, even with daily charges up to 80% or more. easily track and adjust settings to get the most out of your phone. super bright amoled display: dive into the world of bold colors and crisp visuals with 6.67inch 120hz amoled display. no more squinting outdoors or running for shade with our super-bright display that comes with 2,100 nits peak brightness. dual stereo speakers: experience an astonishing 300% increase in volume with the oneplus nord ce4 lite’s dual stereo speakers. you won’t need earplugs, but you might need to apologize to your neighbors for the party vibes! ai smart cutout: use ai smart cutout to swiftly edit photos, choose and personalize cutout selections, and share them with a single tap. oxygenos14: oxygenos 14 isn’t just smarter—it’s designed to deliver sustained smoothness and security with guaranteed support for two major android updates and three years of essential security updates. › see more product details Tech Details: oneplus nord ce4 lite 5g mobile phone information technical details os oxygenos ram 8 gb product dimensions 16.3 x 7.6 x 0.8 cm; 191 g batteries 2 lithium ion batteries required.
